## Chapter One

[[People/Aldric|Aldric]] came back to the manor and sat by the fire.[^1][^2]

Peter spoke quietly to Peter before they parted ways.

He recalled an old verse:*[[People/Corentin|Corentin]] sailed beneath a distant star, alone. / He never saw the shore again.* (lit.: A literal rendering of the same two lines, worded differently.) before falling quiet.

[^1]: An old legend concerning [[People/Ysolde|Ysolde]]'s voyage.
[^2]: A myth, told at length:
